summary: Regression retest of the hard-reload/deep-link deadlock fix in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js. ALL PRIMARY REGRESSION SCENARIOS PASS. Hard-reloading /admin, /profile, and /buy-credits as admin now renders the page content and fires the expected API calls (/auth/me, /admin/overview, /admin/users). Physician hard-reloading /admin is now correctly redirected to /dashboard (guard runs since spinner resolves). Physician sidebar still has no Admin item. Logout clears session and hard-reloading /dashboard after logout redirects to /login. Admin login lands on /admin; physician login lands on /dashboard. Frontend-only regression testing per request; backend suite from iteration_4 (15/15) not re-run.
critical_code_review_comments: api.js fix is minimal and correct: onAuthStateChange caches the token and tokenFromStorage() gives a synchronous fallback on hard reload. No more re-entrant supabase.auth.getSession() inside the interceptor.

Note: tokenFromStorage() iterates window.localStorage keys on every request when accessToken cache is empty; fine here but a tiny perf/wart. Consider seeding accessToken once at module load from the same lookup to avoid the loop on early requests.
test_credentials: Admin dr.admin@pacopilot.health / PaCopilot2026! ; Physician physician@pacopilot-tests.com / Test1234!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hard-reload deadlock is fixed. Verified via full page.goto() to /admin, /profile, /buy-credits after login for both admin and physician - all render, expected data-testids appear, /auth/me and admin endpoints fire. Physician->/admin redirects to /dashboard. Logout+hard-reload /dashboard redirects to /login. Physician sidebar has no Admin link. Only warning still visible: cdn-cgi/rum tracker abort (harmless).
rca of the issue: Previous iteration_4 bug (Supabase GoTrue lock deadlock caused by await supabase.auth.getSession() inside axios interceptor while AuthProvider.onAuthStateChange was awaiting loadProfile) has been resolved. New interceptor uses cached access_token from onAuthStateChange callback + synchronous localStorage fallback (sb-*-auth-token) so no re-entrant Supabase call occurs during request handling.
